summary: Phase 2 stylist portal verified end-to-end. Backend: login (good+401), public stylists strips pin, blocks create/delete reflects in /api/availability, validation errors return 400, schedule hydrates service, PATCH status done/invalid behaves correctly, weekly availability returns working_hours+blocks+bookings. Frontend: login flow, portal header+tabs, Today list with booking card, Done updates badge to Done, weekly grid (7x24+) renders, click toggles available->busy with toast and persists to customer availability, click again clears, sign out returns to /stylist login.
passed: POST /api/stylist/login valid creds returns 200 with token+stylist (no pin field)
PUT /api/stylist/stylist-michael/blocks (busy 13:00-14:00) returns 200 with block.id; /api/availability marks 12:45..13:45 unavailable
DELETE /api/stylist/.../blocks/{id} (with follow-redirect) re-opens slots; availability fully restored (47/47)
PUT blocks with status='leave' accepted; status='something' -> 400; end_time<=start_time -> 400
POST /api/bookings tomorrow 10:00 Michael svc-beard-sculpt -> schedule returns booking with hydrated 'service' and status='upcoming'
Frontend /stylist shows 3 options; Michael+3456 -> /stylist/portal with 'Michael Voss' header, tabs Today + Weekly availability
Today tab shows booking-card-{id}; clicking btn-done-{id} updates status badge to 'Done'
Weekly grid renders; clicking available cell shows 'Marked Busy' toast and turns amber (busy); /api/availability for that date+time shows available=false
Clicking busy cell again clears it back to available (verified via subsequent test where cell no longer present)
btn-logout returns to /stylist login screen with 'Welcome, Michael' toast
action_items: Minor: DELETE /api/stylist/{id}/blocks/{bid} responds with 307 redirect (likely trailing-slash). curl without -L doesn't follow. Functionality is fine but consider removing the redirect for stricter clients.
Cleanup performed: removed seeded today booking and 2 leftover test blocks from stylist_blocks.
